suggestion.rationale: entity_mta-real-estate-tod and entity_mta-transit-oriented-development share entity_type 'department', same acronym TOD, and near-identical descriptions; their name difference (with/without 'MTA') is a source-local abbreviation, satisfying test 2. entity_mta-tod-meeting-doc-160301 has entity_type 'program', a strong identity field that contradicts the other two records, so test 1 forces do_not_merge for both pairs. The payload identity fields are decisive; no ambiguous context is needed.
